group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Sara Osei"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Productivity Researcher"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","9 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"January 3, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Focus is not a fixed trait — it is a skill that can be trained and an environment that can be engineered. This guide covers what actually degrades attention, and the specific strategies research shows can rebuild it."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-focus-crisis","children":"The Focus Crisis"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The average knowledge worker checks their phone 96 times per day. Email is checked on average every 6 minutes. The average attention span before an unintentional task switch is 40 seconds."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44","$L45","$L46","$L47","$L48","$L49","$L4a","$L4b","$L4c","$L4d"]}],"$L4e","$L4f","$L50"]}],"$L51"]}]]}]
52:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
53:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
54:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511671782779-c97d3d27a1d4?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545987796-200677ee1011?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"These are not character flaws. They are the predictable result of digital environments designed by engineers whose incentive is to capture and hold attention — not to support your ability to think clearly."}}]
2a:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Focus problems are, in large part, environmental and systems problems. Which means they have environmental and systems solutions."}}]
2b:["$","h2","4",{"id":"why-focus-degrades","children":"Why Focus Degrades"}]
2c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Before strategies, the mechanisms:"}}]
2d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Attention residue</strong> (Sophie Leroy, 2009): When you switch between tasks, part of your cognitive attention remains on the previous task. This residue reduces performance on the new task. The more frequently you switch, the more residue accumulates."}}]
2e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Notification hijacking</strong>: Each notification triggers an orienting response — an involuntary attention shift that requires effort to suppress and recover from. The appearance of a notification badge is sufficient to degrade ongoing task performance."}}]
2f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cognitive load accumulation</strong>: Every open tab, unresolved notification, unanswered message, and incomplete task occupies working memory. The more of these that exist, the less cognitive bandwidth is available for focused work."}}]
30:["$","h2","9",{"id":"12-strategies-that-actually-work","children":"12 Strategies That Actually Work"}]
31:["$","h3","10",{"id":"1-design-for-friction","children":"1. Design for Friction"}]
32:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Make the things you want to do easy and the things you want to avoid hard. Move social media apps off the first page of your phone (or delete them). Use a site blocker during focus sessions. The more steps between you and distraction, the less frequently you will reach for it."}}]
33:["$","h3","12",{"id":"2-single-tab-policy-during-deep-work","children":"2. Single-Tab Policy During Deep Work"}]
34:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Having multiple browser tabs open creates visible cues for task-switching. During deep work sessions, close all tabs except the one you are working in. Close email and messaging applications entirely — not minimise, close."}}]
35:["$","h3","14",{"id":"3-work-in-defined-sessions-with-defined-ends","children":"3. Work in Defined Sessions With Defined Ends"}]
36:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Open-ended work sessions create ongoing decisions about when to stop, which creates ongoing low-level distraction. A 90-minute work block with a specific task and a defined end time removes this noise."}}]
37:["$","h3","16",{"id":"4-manage-your-phone-physically","children":"4. Manage Your Phone Physically"}]
38:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"University of Texas research found that even the presence of a smartphone on a desk — face down, silent — reduced working memory capacity. Put the phone in another room during focus sessions."}}]
39:["$","h3","18",{"id":"5-use-noise-architecture-intentionally","children":"5. Use Noise Architecture Intentionally"}]
3a:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Research on sound and cognitive performance finds:"}}]
3b:["$","ul","20",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Silence: best for most analytical tasks"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Moderate ambient sound (~65 dB): beneficial for creative tasks"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Music with lyrics: actively harmful for language-based tasks"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"White or brown noise: useful for masking unpredictable environmental sounds"}}]]}]
3c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Choose your audio environment as deliberately as you choose your task."}}]
3d:["$","h3","22",{"id":"6-create-environmental-triggers","children":"6. Create Environmental Triggers"}]
3e:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Consistent environments become associated with specific mental states. If you always do deep work at the same desk, in the same physical setup, the environment itself becomes a focus trigger. Use the same setup, the same desk, the same music (or silence) for your focus sessions. Consistency compounds."}}]
3f:["$","h3","24",{"id":"7-train-with-progressively-longer-sessions","children":"7. Train with Progressively Longer Sessions"}]
40:["$","p","25",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Focus is a trainable skill. Begin with 25-minute focused sessions. Extend by 5 minutes weekly. After six weeks, 60–90-minute sessions become achievable without significant effort."}}]
41:["$","h3","26",{"id":"8-eliminate-incomplete-tasks-from-working-memory","children":"8. Eliminate Incomplete Tasks From Working Memory"}]
42:["$","p","27",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The Zeigarnik Effect describes the tendency of the mind to continue processing incomplete tasks. Open loops occupy cognitive bandwidth."}}]
43:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The solution: a trusted capture system. Every task, idea, or commitment is written down in a single place. Your brain can release it knowing it will not be lost."}}]
44:["$","h3","29",{"id":"9-strategic-caffeine-use","children":"9. Strategic Caffeine Use"}]
45:["$","p","30",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Caffeine improves sustained attention and reaction time — reliably, in peer-reviewed research. Key variables: dose (100–200mg), timing (90 minutes after waking to avoid cortisol interference), and avoiding late-afternoon use that disrupts sleep."}}]
46:["$","h3","31",{"id":"10-take-genuine-breaks","children":"10. Take Genuine Breaks"}]
47:["$","p","32",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Recovery is not optional. What constitutes rest: a walk, a brief conversation, mindless physical activity. What does not constitute rest: scrolling social media, checking email, reading news. Only activities that allow the prefrontal cortex to disengage provide genuine recovery."}}]
48:["$","h3","33",{"id":"11-fix-your-sleep","children":"11. Fix Your Sleep"}]
49:["$","p","34",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Cognitive performance on sustained attention tasks degrades by 25% after one night of six hours sleep. No focus strategy compensates for chronic sleep deficit. Address this first."}}]
4a:["$","h3","35",{"id":"12-address-the-environment-before-the-individual","children":"12. Address the Environment Before the Individual"}]
4b:["$","p","36",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If your focus problems are persistent despite individual effort, examine the environmental causes: clutter and visual noise, constant notification interruptions, other people in your space."}}]
4c:["$","p","37",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Environmental fixes are more durable than willpower. A workspace engineered for focus requires less effort to focus in than one that works against you. Read our guide on <a href=\"/blog/deep-work-distraction-free-workspace\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">designing a distraction-free workspace</a> for the environmental side."}}]
4d:["$","blockquote","38",{"children":"The most focused people are not those with the strongest willpower. They are those who have arranged their environment so that willpower is rarely required."}]
4e:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Productivity","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Productivity"}],[["$","$L7","focus",{"href":"/blog/tag/focus","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","focus"]}],["$","$L7","concentration",{"href":"/blog/tag/concentration","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","concentration"]}],["$","$L7","deep-work",{"href":"/blog/tag/deep-work","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","deep-work"]}],["$","$L7","productivity",{"href":"/blog/tag/productivity","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","productivity"]}],["$","$L7","habits",{"href":"/blog/tag/habits","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","habits"]}]]]}]
4f:["$","$L52",null,{"title":"How to Improve Focus: 12 Evidence-Based Strategies That Work","slug":"how-to-improve-focus"}]
50:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L53",null,{}]}]
51:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L54",null,{"items":[{"id":"the-focus-crisis","text":"The Focus Crisis","level":2},{"id":"why-focus-degrades","text":"Why Focus Degrades","level":2},{"id":"12-strategies-that-actually-work","text":"12 Strategies That Actually Work","level":2},{"id":"1-design-for-friction","text":"1. 23:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
57:I[27201,["/_next/static/chunks/01xlw8hd842-c.js","/_next/static/chunks/0d3shmwh5_nmn.js"],"IconMark"]
20:null
25:[["$","title","0",{"children":"How to Improve Focus: 12 Evidence-Based Strategies That Work"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Focus is not a fixed trait — it is a skill that can be trained and an environment that can be engineered. This guide covers what actually degrades attention, and the specific strategies research shows can rebuild it."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"manifest","href":"/manifest.webmanifest","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}],["$","link","3",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://deskbly.com/blog/how-to-improve-focus"}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:title","content":"How to Improve Focus: 12 Evidence-Based Strategies That Work"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:description","content":"Focus is not a fixed trait — it is a skill that can be trained and an environment that can be engineered. This guide covers what actually degrades attention, and the specific strategies research shows can rebuild it."}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/how-to-improve-focus"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499750310107-5fef28a66643?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image:height","content":"800"}],["$","meta","10",{"property":"og:image:alt","content":"How to Improve Focus: 12 Evidence-Based Strategies That Work"}],["$","meta","11",{"property":"og:type","content":"article"}],["$","meta","12",{"property":"article:published_time","content":"2026-01-03"}],["$","meta","13",{"property":"article:modified_time","content":"2026-01-03"}],["$","meta","14",{"property":"article:author","content":"Sara Osei"}],["$","meta","15",{"property":"article:section","content":"Productivity"}],["$","meta","16",{"property":"article:tag","content":"focus"}],["$","meta","17",{"property":"article:tag","content":"concentration"}],["$","meta","18",{"property":"article:tag","content":"deep-work"}],["$","meta","19",{"property":"article:tag","content":"productivity"}],["$","meta","20",{"property":"article:tag","content":"habits"}],["$","meta","21",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","22",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"How to Improve Focus: 12 Evidence-Based Strategies That Work"}],["$","meta","23",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Focus is not a fixed trait — it is a skill that can be trained and an environment that can be engineered. This guide covers what actually degrades attention, and the specific strategies research shows can rebuild it."}],["$","meta","24",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499750310107-5fef28a66643?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80"}],["$","link","25",{"rel":"icon","href":"/icon?c0b95df96f490973","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"32x32"}],["$","link","26",{"rel":"apple-touch-icon","href":"/apple-icon?f7f63e177608d30c","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"180x180"}],["$","$L57","27",{}]]
